tagline: Yard cleanup, trimming, repairs, and hauling for clean outdoor spaces.
estimateLine: Call or text to schedule a walk-through.
contactIntro: Call or text for yard cleanup, trimming, fence repairs, gutter cleaning, trash removal, and weed removal.
footerLine: Tree trimming, bush trimming, fence repairs, trash removal, yard cleaning, gutter cleaning, and weed removal.

services.title: Tree trimming
services.description: Trim back branches, open up walkways, and keep trees away from fences and structures.

services.title: Bush and hedge trimming
services.description: Shape front-yard and backyard bushes so entrances, windows, and paths look clean.

services.title: Fence repairs
services.description: Handle small fence fixes, loose boards, leaning sections, and basic repair needs.

services.title: Trash removal
services.description: Remove yard debris, unwanted outdoor items, and cleanup waste after a job.

services.title: General yard cleaning
services.description: Clean up overgrowth, fallen leaves, cluttered corners, and neglected outdoor areas.

services.title: Gutter cleaning
services.description: Clear gutters and downspouts so rainwater can move away from the home.

services.title: Weed removal
services.description: Pull and clear weeds from garden beds, fence lines, walkways, and yard edges.
